obligations.source_quote: The providers of the general-purpose AI model concerned or its representative shall supply the information requested.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a general-purpose AI model (or its representative) during Commission evaluations

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must supply information requested during AI Office evaluations
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL supply the information requested during evaluations

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers of general-purpose AI models during Commission evaluations
